product_definition.title: Interaction System
product_definition.description: A modular, trace-based interaction framework for UE5.5. Supports line-trace and sphere-trace detection, interaction UI prompts, hold-to-interact, and contextual interaction data. Fully replicated for multiplayer.
product_definition.target_audience: Indie and AA game developers building first/third-person games

core_features: Line-trace and sphere-trace based interactable detection
IInteractable interface with Interact, CanInteract, GetInteractionData
Interaction component attachable to any Actor
Interactable focus highlight using custom depth stencil

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: Player walks up to interactable object, hold-to-interact completes
